required_preferences.fact: Eats breakfast earlier in the morning, prioritizing iron-rich foods and vitamin C sources — avoids coffee and black tea at breakfast to maximize iron absorption

supersedes.fact: Eats breakfast only after 11am — never starts with coffee, always makes herbal tea first

required_preferences.fact: Limits all digital sketching sessions to a maximum of 30 minutes, alternating with mandated shoulder stretching breaks and wearing braces as needed, even if projects are urgent

supersedes.fact: Wears a wrist brace for any digital sketching session over 30 minutes — never pushes through discomfort

required_preferences.fact: Never works through scheduled yoga class times, even under deadline pressure
Shops for groceries at the Saturday farmers market — avoids supermarkets unless necessary
Prepares Willow’s daily medication and prescription food each morning before starting any work or personal routine
Always sends a physical card for family birthdays, never just a text message

persona: A freelance graphic designer who sells custom prints online
